name: realtor-shortform-system
description: An ongoing short-form content operating system for real estate agents — daily green-screen reactions, talking-head value, and carousels, each optimized per platform (Instagram/Facebook, TikTok, YouTube Shorts). The agent thinks in formats; Claude keeps the funnel balanced. Text only: it writes scripts, talking points, captions, and specs — it never films, edits, or designs. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first.
